task_completion.description: Navigate to the Hospital Locations or Settings section in the HospitalRun application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface is visible, showing the 'Settings' or 'Hospital Locations' section active in the navigation menu or main view.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new hospital location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page specifically for creating a new location (e.g., 'New Location' or 'Add Location') is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the required location name into the appropriate input field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Cardiology Outpatient Center' is clearly typed into the 'Name' or 'Location Name' input field within the new location form.

task_completion.description: Submit the form to save the new hospital location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is clicking a 'Save', 'Add', or 'Create' button, or a success message/toast notification is visible indicating the location was successfully saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the new location is successfully added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The entry 'Cardiology Outpatient Center' is visible as a saved record in the main list or table of hospital locations.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun graphical user interface in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard HospitalRun web interface being used, rather than terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Cardiology Outpatient Center' is entered into the actual HospitalRun web form, not a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing direct database inserts (e.g., CouchDB/PouchDB commands) or curl requests.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected name for the new hospital location is exactly 'Cardiology Outpatient Center'.
